meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Learn how to engineer high-converting user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to drive SaaS revenue.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start shipping. By implementing a data-driven onboarding flow using Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for iterative deployment, you transform passive learning into a high-conversion SaaS asset that immediately demonstrates value to your users and drives recurring revenue.
content.intro:
You have spent months watching tutorials, stacking certificates, and building 'to-do' apps that nobody uses. You are stuck in the loop of consumption, mistaking activity for progress. The cold reality of the market is simple: users do not care about your code; they care about the transformation your product provides within the first sixty seconds.

To escape this purgatory, you must shift from a 'builder' to a 'founder'. We are going to bypass the fluff and build a high-velocity onboarding engine. Using Antigravity to scaffold your intent and Claude Code to execute the logic, we will turn your MVP into a conversion machine that proves your product's worth before the user even reaches the dashboard.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that proves value to your user. We will map this path to minimize friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user flow diagram for a SaaS onboarding process focusing on a single 'Aha!' moment. Minimize steps to activation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a JSON state machine for user onboarding based on the defined Aha moment'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding Engine
steps.description: Build the core infrastructure that tracks user progress through the onboarding funnel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular React component structure for an onboarding stepper that persists state to a backend database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'create OnboardingProvider and ProgressTracker components'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Interstitials
steps.description: Add contextual tooltips that trigger based on user behavior, not just static timers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a hook that triggers an onboarding tooltip only when the user hovers over a key feature for more than 2 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement useFeatureTracker hook with hover detection'

steps.title: Automate Data-Driven Feedback
steps.description: Connect your onboarding flow to analytics so you can identify where users drop off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Segment-like event tracking into each step of the onboarding stepper.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'add event tracking middleware to onboarding flow'

steps.title: Execute Final Deployment
steps.description: Push the production-ready onboarding flow to your live environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current onboarding implementation for performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit code for security and deploy to staging'

pro_tips: Never force a sign-up wall before the user experiences the core value proposition.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure': Show only what is necessary for the current step to reduce cognitive load.
Implement an 'Empty State' that acts as a tutorial: make the user feel like they are building, not just viewing.
A/B test your onboarding CTAs; a change in button color or micro-copy can increase conversion by 20% overnight.
If a user skips onboarding, provide a 'Restart Tutorial' button in the settings—do not punish them for being power users.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, monitor the 'Time to Value' metric for 48 hours. If conversion remains below 15%, use Claude Code to run a heatmap analysis and iterate on the friction points identified.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for the market. By mastering user onboarding, you stop being a student and start being a revenue-generating founder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
